item.title: Demon Lord Reborn - Free Preview Chapter 1
item.description:
Chapter 1: The Fall of the Demon Castle

The cold iron sword pierced his chest, black blood soaking the stone throne. The twelve knights he trusted stood before him, their blades stained with his loyal demon soldiers’ blood.

“I gave you everything,” the Demon Lord whispered, his vision fading fast. “Why?”

“The human empire promised us gold and land,” the lead knight sneered. “Your dark rule ends today.”

As his consciousness slipped away, a faint ancient curse echoed in his soul: I shall return, in flesh weak, power sealed, to burn this world anew.
